hook.question: For developers, researchers, and architects who need spec semantics, extraction pipelines, and extension points.

trackIntro.title: Technical Deep-Dive Flow
trackIntro.subtitle: Architecture first, then state semantics, vector math, extraction pipelines, and extension strategy.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.description: Understand observer, analyzer, and reporter boundaries for integration.

calculation.title: Calculation Logic
calculation.description: Follow polarity and transition mapping from JSV states to DV vectors.

extensibility.title: Extensibility
extensibility.description: Add domain markers and fields without breaking protocol semantics.

trackIntro.conclusion: Use this deck for implementers, auditors, and specification contributors.

point1.title: System Architecture
point1.observer: Hooks into the conversation flow to capture real-time data.
point1.analyzer: Processes conversational data against markers to generate JSVs and DVs.
point1.reporter: Visualizes results or exports to JSON/Markdown.
point1.conclusion: Protocol-native modular architecture for product and research integration.

point2.title: JSV Data Structure
point2.subtitle: Four core fields with explicit enums, plus domain extension slots.

point3.title: JSV Extraction Methods
point3.subtitle: Deterministic, model-based, and hybrid pipelines for extracting judgment state.

marker.title: Marker-based
marker.description: Pattern matching using YAML-defined linguistic markers. Fast and deterministic.
marker.pros: Low latency, no API cost, fully explainable

ai.title: AI Observer
ai.description: LLM analyzes conversation context to infer judgment state. More nuanced understanding.

hybrid.title: Hybrid
hybrid.description: Markers for clear signals, AI for ambiguous cases. Best of both worlds.

point3.recommendation: Recommended: Start with markers, add AI for edge cases.

formula.title: Delta Calculation
formula.note: Each field transition is mapped via polarity tables and assembled into DV vectors.

markers.title: Custom Markers
markers.description: Organizations can define their own markers in YAML to capture domain-specific language.

fields.title: Custom DV Fields
fields.description: The protocol allows for adding new vector fields to measure specific aspects.

summary.title: Evolve JDVP with Us

point1.label: The Core:
point1.text: Clear architecture, explicit semantics, and reproducible algorithms.

point2.label: The Flexibility:
point2.text: An extension model for domain-specific telemetry and policy needs.

point3.label: The Invitation:
point3.text: Contribute markers, schemas, evaluation cases, and implementation feedback.

summary.tagline: Help define the measurement standard for human-AI judgment flow.
